title: Senior Manager, Cocoa Sourcing
description:
about the company

My client is a well-known soft commodities company who is looking for a Senior Manager with at least 5 years of related experience to join their rank.


about the job

  • Lead and mentor a specialized team of cocoa buyers to manage regional procurement and pricing strategies for chocolate factories across the AMEA region
  • Drive profitability as a key profit center owner, managing a position-taking P&L 
  • Develop and execute trading strategies to optimize positions during various market trends, utilizing hedging tools and deep analysis of market fundamentals
  • Oversee the clear and timely delivery of information and trade execution, working closely with operational staff across regional Asian sites

about the manager/team

  • Report to VP
  • Travel often 

skills and experience required

  • Minimum 5 years of related experience
  • Diploma/Degree in Finance, Accountancy, Computer Science, Statistics, or equivalent. Additional certifications like CFA or CAIA are an added advantage
  • Strong skills in Microsoft Office and SAP are required.
  • Familiarity with trading platforms (Bloomberg, Reuters, TT, etc.) and programming languages (SQL, Python, R) is highly advantageous
  • Keen sense of data analytics, financial modeling, and interpretation to drive decision-making in a high-pressure environment
  • Strong skills in Microsoft Office and SAP are required. Familiarity with trading platforms (Bloomberg, Reuters, TT, etc.) and programming languages (SQL, Python, R) is highly advantageous
  • Keen sense of data analytics, financial modeling, and interpretation to drive decision-making in a high-pressure environment
  • Proven ability to manage and mentor a team to deliver business objectives, with a self-starter attitude and strong passion for markets

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Joanie Lau at 8938 3128.

(EA: 94C3609/ R23112944 )

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
